metadata.description: Collection of Claude Code plugins by Flopsstuff

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Generate and keep documentation in sync with your codebase

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Smart git workflow commands with intelligent conflict resolution

plugins.name: resolve-coderabbit
plugins.description: Walk through CodeRabbit inline PR comments, verify each against the current code, and batch-resolve with commits and replies

plugins.name: hermes-tweet
plugins.description: Guide Hermes Agent X/Twitter workflows with Hermes Tweet, the native Xquik plugin for social listening, research, audits, and controlled publishing.
